about.title: About
about.subtitle: We're on a mission to help small businesses and solopreneurs work smarter, not harder, through intelligent automation.

story.title: Our Story
story.p1: Flownox was born from a simple observation: small business owners spend too much time on repetitive tasks that could be automated.
story.p2: We saw entrepreneurs drowning in emails, struggling to keep up with customer inquiries, and losing hours every week to administrative work. We knew there had to be a better way.
story.p3: Today, we help businesses of all sizes implement AI-powered automation that saves time, reduces errors, and allows teams to focus on what they do best — growing their business.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.description: To democratize AI automation, making enterprise-level efficiency accessible to businesses of every size — so teams can focus on creativity, strategy, and human connection.

simplicity.title: Simplicity First
simplicity.description: We believe powerful technology should be easy to use. Our solutions are designed for simplicity without sacrificing capability.

results.title: Results-Driven
results.description: We measure our success by your success. Every automation we build is designed to deliver measurable ROI.

partnership.title: True Partnership
partnership.description: We're not just vendors — we're partners invested in your long-term success and growth.

innovation.title: Innovation
innovation.description: We stay at the cutting edge of AI technology to bring you the most effective automation solutions.

location.title: Based in Ireland
location.subtitle: Serving Clients Globally
location.description: We're a remote-first company serving clients globally, with a special focus on helping Irish and European businesses embrace automation.

about.readyToWorkDescription: Let's discuss how Flownox can transform your business operations.

services.title: Our
services.subtitle: Comprehensive AI automation solutions designed to transform every aspect of your business operations.

support.title: AI Customer Support
support.description: Deploy intelligent chatbots that handle customer inquiries 24/7, providing instant responses and seamless escalation when needed.

booking.title: Smart Booking Systems
booking.description: Eliminate scheduling headaches with automated booking, reminders, and follow-ups that keep your calendar full and organized.

crm.title: CRM & Workflow Automation
crm.description: Streamline your sales pipeline with automated lead scoring, follow-ups, and customer journey management.

invoicing.title: Invoicing & Payments
invoicing.description: Automate your billing cycle from invoice generation to payment collection and reconciliation.

chatbot.title: Website Chat & AI Widgets
chatbot.description: Engage visitors with intelligent chat widgets that qualify leads, answer questions, and book appointments.

custom.title: Custom Automation
custom.description: Bespoke automation solutions tailored to your unique business processes and requirements.

howItWorksPage.title: How It
howItWorksPage.subtitle: A proven, structured process that takes you from workflow chaos to automated efficiency in weeks, not months.

discover.title: Discover & Analyze
discover.subtitle: Understanding Your Business
discover.description: We start by diving deep into your existing workflows, systems, and pain points. Through discovery calls and process audits, we identify the highest-impact automation opportunities.

build.title: Build & Customize
build.subtitle: Tailored Solutions
build.description: Our team designs and builds custom AI automation solutions specifically for your needs. No cookie-cutter approaches — every system is tailored to your unique processes.

deploy.title: Deploy & Integrate
deploy.subtitle: Seamless Go-Live
deploy.description: We handle the entire deployment process, ensuring seamless integration with your existing tools and minimal disruption to your operations.

monitor.title: Monitor & Optimize
monitor.subtitle: Continuous Improvement
monitor.description: Our relationship doesn't end at deployment. We continuously monitor performance, gather feedback, and optimize your automation for maximum ROI.

duration.q: How long does the entire process take?
duration.a: Most projects are completed within 4-8 weeks from kickoff to go-live, depending on complexity and scope.

technical.q: Do I need technical expertise on my team?
technical.a: No. We handle all technical aspects and provide comprehensive training for your team to use the new systems.

changes.q: What if I need changes after deployment?
changes.a: Our ongoing support includes regular optimization cycles. Additional changes can be made as part of our maintenance plan.

useCases.title: Use
useCases.subtitle: Discover how businesses across industries have transformed their operations with Flownox automation solutions.

healthcare.title: Healthcare & Clinics
healthcare.description: Automated patient scheduling, reminders, and follow-up care coordination for medical practices.
healthcare.challenge: Managing patient appointments, reducing no-shows, and coordinating follow-up care was consuming valuable staff time.
healthcare.solution: We implemented an AI-powered scheduling system with automated reminders, intake forms, and post-visit follow-ups.

ecommerce.title: E-commerce & Retail
ecommerce.description: Streamlined order processing, inventory management, and customer communication for online stores.
ecommerce.challenge: Manual order processing and inventory updates were causing delays and errors, leading to customer complaints.
ecommerce.solution: Automated order workflows, real-time inventory sync, and AI-powered customer support chatbot.

agencies.title: Marketing Agencies
agencies.description: Automated client onboarding, reporting, and project management workflows for creative agencies.
agencies.challenge: Client onboarding took weeks, and manual reporting was eating into billable hours.
agencies.solution: Streamlined onboarding automation, automated reporting dashboards, and project status updates.

realestate.title: Real Estate
realestate.description: Lead management, property matching, and client communication automation for real estate professionals.
realestate.challenge: Leads were falling through the cracks, and agents were spending too much time on administrative tasks.
realestate.solution: AI-powered lead scoring, automated property matching, and follow-up sequences.

consulting.title: Consulting Firms
consulting.description: Proposal generation, time tracking, and client management automation for professional services.
consulting.challenge: Creating proposals and tracking billable hours was a manual, error-prone process.
consulting.solution: Automated proposal generation, integrated time tracking, and client portal for seamless communication.

hospitality.title: Hospitality & Events
hospitality.description: Booking management, guest communication, and event coordination automation.
hospitality.challenge: Managing reservations across multiple platforms and coordinating events was overwhelming.
hospitality.solution: Centralized booking system, automated guest communications, and event workflow automation.

intro.title: Introduction
intro.content: At Flownox, we take your privacy seriously. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, disclose, and safeguard your information when you visit our website or use our services.

collection.title: Information We Collect
collection.content: We may collect information about you in various ways, including:

use.title: How We Use Your Information
use.content: We use the information we collect to provide, maintain, and improve our services, communicate with you, and comply with legal obligations.

sharing.title: Information Sharing
sharing.content: We do not sell your personal information. We may share information with trusted service providers who assist us in operating our business.

security.title: Data Security
security.content: We implement appropriate security measures to protect your personal information from unauthorized access, alteration, or destruction.

rights.title: Your Rights
rights.content: You have the right to access, correct, or delete your personal information. Contact us to exercise these rights.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.content: If you have questions about this Privacy Policy, please contact us at:

intro.title: Agreement to Terms
intro.content: By accessing or using Flownox's services, you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service. If you disagree with any part of these terms, you may not access our services.

services.title: Our Services
services.content: Flownox provides AI automation consulting and implementation services. We reserve the right to modify or discontinue our services at any time.

obligations.title: Your Obligations
obligations.content: You agree to use our services only for lawful purposes and in accordance with these Terms. You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account.

intellectual.title: Intellectual Property
intellectual.content: All content, features, and functionality of our services are owned by Flownox and are protected by intellectual property laws.

liability.title: Limitation of Liability
liability.content: Flownox shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, or consequential damages arising from your use of our services.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.content: If you have questions about these Terms, please contact us at:
